atoms.label: Additional
atoms.description: Sidebar inline divider, caption, button stack, or label row.

atoms.label: Button
atoms.description: Trigger an action with multiple variants and sizes.

atoms.label: Cell
atoms.description: Sidebar row group; expandable header with indented children.

atoms.label: Cell Item
atoms.description: Single sidebar navigation row with state, active, and indent variants.

atoms.label: CheckboxLabel
atoms.description: Checkbox composed with a text label.

atoms.label: Icons
atoms.description: Tree-shakable React icon set (2,278 icons, line + fill variants).

atoms.label: Info Card
atoms.description: Sidebar bottom announcement / upgrade card (lg warning, sm trial+progress).

atoms.label: RadioLabel
atoms.description: Radio composed with a text label.

atoms.label: Tail Icon
atoms.description: Action icon affordance attached to sidebar rows (sm/lg, default/hover/disabled).

atoms.label: User
atoms.description: Sidebar user row (avatar, name, handle, optional Pro badge, tail icons).

molecules.label: Bottom
molecules.description: Sidebar bottom region: InfoCard + cells + user.

molecules.label: Dropdown
molecules.description: Menu of selectable items triggered by a button.

molecules.label: Middle
molecules.description: Sidebar middle region: caption-headed cell groups (1-4 blocks).

molecules.label: Search Input
molecules.description: Input with a search icon affordance.

molecules.label: Sidebar
molecules.description: Full sidebar (Top + Middle + Bottom), 280×1024, fill toggle.

molecules.label: Table Cell
molecules.description: Single body cell for tabular data.

molecules.label: Top
molecules.description: Sidebar top region: user + divider + caption (+ optional buttons/label).
